headline: The FAA Is Upgrading Air Traffic Control. RTX, Leidos and Other Companies Are Doing the Work.
summary: It’s far too early to guess at the root causes of the recent tragedy at LaGuardia airport.  Several public and private companies are involved in efforts to improve the system.  Sunday night, an  Air Canada  flight arriving from Montreal struck a Port Authority Aircraft Rescue and Firefighting vehicle.

headline: Senate confirms Markwayne Mullin as next DHS secretary
summary: President Donald Trump tapped Sen. Markwayne Mullin, R-Okla., earlier this month to replace embattled DHS Secretary Kristi Noem.

headline: Sen. Warren questions DOD about Anthropic blacklist that 'appears to be retaliation'
summary: Warren sent letters to Pete Hegseth and Sam Altman, asking for additional details of OpenAI's contract with the defense department and Anthropic's blacklisting.
